membership_policy: Frozen project-controlled approximately 70/15/15 membership recorded by reports/dataset_manifest.csv. The original membership-generation seed and exact grouping algorithm are not independently reconstructable from the committed evidence.
known_limitations: Dataset image archives and large trained checkpoints are distributed separately.
The exact historical reason for five frozen-release omissions is unavailable.
The local raw export metadata used a different Roboflow workspace URL from the required canonical attribution URL.
Augmentation is applied at training time; images stored in the frozen dataset are not permanently augmented.
Detector speed values were produced by different frameworks and timing procedures and are not a controlled hardware comparison.
The final pipeline examples are qualitative demonstrations; a complete end-to-end test-set accuracy was not calculated.
repository_scope: The dataset release metadata describes the frozen one-class detector dataset. The same repository also contains implemented and evaluated YOLOv8n, RT-DETR-L, RF-DETR Medium, OCR v1/v2, emirate-classification, and end-to-end demo code.
